$comment: Authoritative surface manifest for the native Claude Code CSM plugin. Every command, agent, and skill is declared here with the MCP tools it orchestrates. scripts/validate-claude-surface.mjs enforces that this catalog, the on-disk bundle files, and the live MCP tool set stay in agreement. MCP is the sole tool authority; commands/agents/skills only orchestrate it.

commands.name: csm-recall
commands.description: Search project memory and assemble focused evidence for the current task.

commands.name: csm-brief
commands.description: Build a context brief for the current task from prior sessions.

commands.name: csm-checkpoint
commands.description: Create or inspect durable checkpoints of expensive-to-reconstruct state.

commands.name: csm-handoff
commands.description: Write a concrete handoff summary before stopping or transferring work.

commands.name: csm-goals
commands.description: List, set, or update tracked goals for this project.

commands.name: csm-beliefs
commands.description: Review belief knowledge, run a belief scan, and preview promotions.

commands.name: csm-selfmodel
commands.description: Inspect the live self-model and living-state capability snapshot.

commands.name: csm-agentbook
commands.description: Read AgentBook state and events, or manage AgentBook rules.

commands.name: csm-governance
commands.description: Run memory governance: dedup detection, candidate and archive reports, merges.

commands.name: csm-compaction
commands.description: Show context pressure and audit compaction behavior.

commands.name: csm-reentry
commands.description: Preview re-entry context and onboarding for resuming work.

commands.name: csm-workledger
commands.description: Show the surviving work-ledger entries across sessions.

agents.name: csm-archivist
agents.description: Memory governance specialist: preview dedup, candidate, and archive reports, then perform merges/deletions only when explicitly requested.

agents.name: csm-continuity-scout
agents.description: Session-start continuity specialist: assemble re-entry context and a task brief from prior sessions, verifying claims against the workspace.

agents.name: csm-handoff-writer
agents.description: Handoff specialist: checkpoint expensive state and write a concrete handoff summary before a transition.

skills.name: csm-continuity
skills.description: Use the full native CSM runtime for continuity across Claude Code tasks.

skills.name: csm-governance
skills.description: Safely dedup, merge, and archive project memory.

skills.name: csm-handoff
skills.description: Checkpoint and hand off work durably before a transition.
